rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a material internal contradiction: it claims SelectGNN is 'fully inductive' yet describes learning a per-node embedding vector e_v for every node in the input graph — a transductive operation that prevents generalization to unseen nodes without re-optimization. Logical consistency checking is load-bearing if the delegation means a scientific review.
rationale.R1.3: The 6.3% gain on OGB-Arxiv is attributed jointly to the abstention head and the inductive design, but no ablation is described to support that attribution. Evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing under a scientific-review reading.
rationale.R1.6: If the delegation means a prose or proofreading check, writing polish becomes the primary load-bearing dimension; this reading cannot be ruled out from 'Check this.' alone.
